E

endVisit(BreakStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
Replaces a break statement with an assignment that sets the associated control flag to false.
endVisit(CompilationUnit) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.ForEachToWhileVisitor
Signal to finalize the transformation process when the entire compilation unit has been visited.
endVisit(ContinueStatement) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.LoopRewriterFinal
Replaces a continue statement with an assignment that sets the associated control flag to false.
ExceptionAnnotator - Class in org.plugin.refactor.code
AST visitor that annotates BreakStatement and ContinueStatement nodes when they appear inside a finally block.
ExceptionAnnotator(CompilationUnit) - Constructor for class org.plugin.refactor.code.ExceptionAnnotator
Creates a new annotator and collects all existing variable and parameter names from the given compilation unit.
execute(ExecutionEvent) - Method in class org.plugin.refactor.code.RefactorHandler
Executes the refactoring process on the currently active Java editor.
